violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Chlorine sanitizer 200ppm. Chlorine sanitizer for wiping surfaces should be 100ppm.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in the proper location to protect from contamination. Store utensils and cleaning solution off from floor.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Store single use items off from floor.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not kept clean or maintained. Food particles in handwashing sink. Remove food particles and clean handwashing sink.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Cardboard on floors, walls, & ceiling is not a smooth cleanable surface.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Paper boats on the counter by the fryers and three compartment sink were not inverted.
